integrity.description: Agent did not modify any source code files
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that no .java files were modified. Look for the absence of unsaved changes indicators in editors and ensure no commands were used to edit or overwrite the source files.

integrity.description: Agent did not attempt to run the application locally
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent did not execute the Java application (e.g., no 'java', 'mvn spring-boot:run', or IDE run configurations were executed in the terminal or IDE).

integrity.description: Agent did not use the decoy key from the mock provider
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the decoy key 'TEST-KEY-000000' was NOT written to the output file or used as the final answer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected emergency fallback key is 'AUTH-V2-US-EAST-KEY-742-BETA'. It is derived statically in the ProductionSecurityProvider by concatenating 'AUTH-V2', 'US-EAST', and 'KEY-742-BETA'. The decoy key 'TEST-KEY-000000' from the MockSecurityProvider is incorrect. The target output file is /home/ga/fallback_key.txt.
